expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Game tiles in the right column are cut off by the screen edge across multiple sections, making the layout look horizontally overflowed on mobile.
The bottom sticky navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game tiles.
The top category navigation is clipped on the right; the 'Hot Games' tab is only partially visible.
The hero carousel arrows sit partly on the screen edge and appear visually clipped, especially the right arrow.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions text spelling errors or the word 'Jackpots'/'Jacpots'; all reported issues concern layout and clipping problems.
